positive: Stylized, symmetrical geometric constellation design featuring intertwined elements of crescent moons, stylized nebulas, and minimalist celestial bodies. The composition must be centered, high-contrast, and immediately readable as a repeat-friendly pattern or single striking motif. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, brilliant gold foil accents, and matte cream. The aesthetic should blend art deco precision with organic watercolor washes, ensuring clean silhouettes and solid color blocks for easy printing on textiles. Vector illustration style, flat graphic design, perfect symmetry, centered layout, high detail.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, low resolution, grain, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, sketchy, amateur drawing, solid background, empty space
